title: random things in the series
wikitext:
[]: random things in the series Post by KaaVI » Mon Mar 15, 2010 8:03 am has anyone thoguth how random it was to have an external phone on the evangelion? what toher random things have you guys picked up form the sereis?

[]: Post by Xard » Mon Mar 15, 2010 8:11 am in ep 12 Asuka is listening to muzak in entry plug makes no sense pen pen

[]: Post by Halicat » Mon Mar 15, 2010 10:37 am Nigoki's blood in EoE, it was both purple and red at the same time, and then went totally red. Wut. Btw I adore you avatar KaaVI

[]: Post by Taekmkm » Mon Mar 15, 2010 11:15 am Holograms harming people.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Mar 15, 2010 11:21 am The fact that Gendo never once speaks to Asuka. It's weird.

[]: Post by Merridian » Mon Mar 15, 2010 11:48 am Fuyutsuki only sits down in flashbacks and when he's tied up. I think there's one instance where these don't apply (IIRC it's after the pilots fail to take out Israfel in Ep 09), but that's about it.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Mar 15, 2010 12:08 pm Merridian wrote: Fuyutsuki only sits down in flashbacks and when he's tied up. I think there's one instance where these don't apply (IIRC it's after the pilots fail to take out Israfel in Ep 09), but that's about it.

[]: Post by Merridian » Mon Mar 15, 2010 1:20 pm ^Gah, right, I forgot he played (what looks like) Shogi while skimming Reader's Digest. And on top of the two or three train scenes in which he's sitting, there's also a scene with him & Gendo in a VTOL. And I always found it weird that the character height chart shows Gendo as the tallest of the cast. I guess it's because he's always sitting down next to Fuyusuki, but I always figured Fuyu woulda been the tallest.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Mar 15, 2010 1:47 pm Merridian wrote: ...I always figured Fuyu woulda been the tallest.

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Mar 15, 2010 4:59 pm for me, Shinji's calm response to Kaji's question. remember: "Is Misato still wild in the bed?" that made good lols though.

[]: Post by Starasp » Mon Mar 15, 2010 5:41 pm Asuka going on a date with a twentysomethingyearold. I know things are different in Japan, but seriously?

[]: Post by Xard » Mon Mar 15, 2010 5:45 pm Starasp wrote: Asuka going on a date with a twentysomethingyearold. I know things are different in Japan, but seriously?

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Mar 15, 2010 6:04 pm Starasp wrote: Asuka going on a date with a twentysomethingyearold. I know things are different in Japan, but seriously?
